creator: pol@leissner.se
text:
I kept the recommended English docs during installation. Later I installed portmaster, cvsuped and ran portmaster -bda. End result was this:

        Installation of converters/libiconv (libiconv-1.13.1_1)

        Installation of www/tidy (tidy-20000804_2)

        Upgrade of en-freebsd-doc-20090913 to en-freebsd-doc-20100213
        Upgrade of portmaster-2.12 to portmaster-2.19

Fix: 

I'm not going to install the document package again, but for other unsuspecting users it would maybe be useful with some kind of warning about this unexpected port bloat because of a relatively harmless package that seemingly contains just text files. The best in my opinion would be to "unportify" the document package, but that is probably not an option since the decision to make it a package has been made.
How-To-Repeat: Install document package and then upgrade the port.
